'''鈭歸-f-d-th''' ('''kawafdethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:back|back]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-f-d-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:back|back]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-f-d-th
|-
! Lemma
| kawafdethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwafdethoko|thiwafdethoko]] || [[word:jiwafdethoko|jiwafdethoko]] || [[word:shiwafdethoko|shiwafdethoko]] || [[word:kiwafdethoko|kiwafdethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwafdethoko|thuthuwafdethoko]] || [[word:jujuwafdethoko|jujuwafdethoko]] || [[word:shushuwafdethoko|shushuwafdethoko]] || [[word:kukuwafdethoko|kukuwafdethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwafdethoko|thuwafdethoko]] || [[word:juwafdethoko|juwafdethoko]] || [[word:shuwafdethoko|shuwafdethoko]] || [[word:kuwafdethoko|kuwafdethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwafdethoko|thuwafdethoko]] || [[word:juwafdethoko|juwafdethoko]] || [[word:shuwafdethoko|shuwafdethoko]] || [[word:kuwafdethoko|kuwafdethoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowafdethoko|thothowafdethoko]] || [[word:jojowafdethoko|jojowafdethoko]] || [[word:shoshowafdethoko|shoshowafdethoko]] || [[word:kokowafdethoko|kokowafdethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowafdethoko|thowafdethoko]] || [[word:jowafdethoko|jowafdethoko]] || [[word:showafdethoko|showafdethoko]] || [[word:kowafdethoko|kowafdethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowafdethoko|thowafdethoko]] || [[word:jowafdethoko|jowafdethoko]] || [[word:showafdethoko|showafdethoko]] || [[word:kowafdethoko|kowafdethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙wafdethoko|th忙wafdethoko]] || [[word:j忙wafdethoko|j忙wafdethoko]] || [[word:sh忙wafdethoko|sh忙wafdethoko]] || [[word:k忙wafdethoko|k忙wafdethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawafdethoko|thathawafdethoko]] || [[word:jajawafdethoko|jajawafdethoko]] || [[word:shashawafdethoko|shashawafdethoko]] || [[word:kakawafdethoko|kakawafdethoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawafdethoko|thawafdethoko]] || [[word:jawafdethoko|jawafdethoko]] || [[word:shawafdethoko|shawafdethoko]] || [[word:kawafdethoko|kawafdethoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
